summary_en: 4,039,700 shares acquired (6.9% of shares outstanding) for ¥15.0B via open-market purchase over 12-month period (May 2025–May 2026). Acquisition now complete. All acquired shares to be cancelled effective 30 June 2026. Post-cancellation issued shares: 54,898,510.
title_en: Notice of Completion of Acquisition of Treasury Stock and Confirmation of Number of Treasury Stock to be Cancelled
translation_en_brief: Glory Ltd. announced the completion of a 12-month treasury stock acquisition program authorized by board resolution on 13 May 2025. The company acquired a total of 4,039,700 shares (6.9% of shares outstanding, calculated against the pre-acquisition issued share count of 57,796,560 shares) for ¥15.0 billion through open-market purchases on the Tokyo Stock Exchange between 14 May 2025 and 13 May 2026. The most recent purchase block (1 May–13 May 2026) acquired 59,000 shares for ¥241.5 million. All acquired shares will be cancelled effective 30 June 2026. Post-cancellation, the company will have 54,898,510 issued shares and hold 1,141,817 shares as treasury stock (as of 13 May 2026).
